message:
🌱 Add dapr: [PubSub] override cloud event attributes via metadata mission (#1680)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dapr-5515-pubsub-override-cloud-event-attributes-via-metadata",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dapr: [PubSub] override cloud event attributes via metadata",
+    "description": "[PubSub] override cloud event attributes via metadata. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dapr deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dapr version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nhelm list -n dapr 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dapr installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dapr configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dapr configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nkubectl get configmap -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dapr\n```\n## Describe the feature\nAt present, there are two ways to publish a Cloud Event via PubSub\n\n1. Supply a payload, which is then automatically wrapped by Dapr in a Cloud Event envelope.\n2."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [PubSub] override cloud event attributes via metadata",
+        "description": "# Description\n\nAllows overriding certain cloud event property via metadata / headers in pubsub publishing. The `cloudevent-` prefix must be used for the metadata key. For example `cloudevent-source` would manually override the `source` value.\n```yaml\nNote the `Content-Type: application/cloudevents+json` header\n\nWe could add a new Content-Type header such as `application/x-dapr-cloudevent` where we don't require a full cloud event envelope. Such as:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nkubectl get events -n dapr --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[PubSub] override cloud event attributes via metadata\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "# Description\n\nAllows overriding certain cloud event property via metadata / headers in pubsub publishing. The `cloudevent-` prefix must be used for the metadata key. For example `cloudevent-source` would manually override the `source` value.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Note the `Content-Type: application/cloudevents+json` header\n\nWe could add a new Content-Type header such as `application/x-dapr-cloudevent` where we don't require a full cloud event envelope. Such as:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+    },
